# Akira

> A Discord card collecting bot built for small friend groups. A curated, personal alternative to Karuta — only characters from anime the server actually watches.

## Docs
- Full reference: /llms-full.txt
- Commands: /commands/{name}
- Economy: /economy/{bits,server-pool,personal-milestone}
- Prestige: /prestige/overview
- Getting started: /getting-started/{what-is-akira,your-first-card,importing-from-karuta}
- WebUI: /webui/{authentication,collection,economy-and-leaderboard}

## Summary
Akira drops anime character cards in a Discord channel. Users grab cards by reacting with number emojis. Cards are collected, traded, burned for currency (bits), and customised with frames and dyes. The card pool is hand-picked by the server — not pulled from every anime ever made.

Akira has a warm, human-like personality. All responses are written in first person as Akira.

## Key concepts
- Cards: character + frame + print number + quality tier (1-5)
- Bits: the only currency. Earned from drops, daily rewards, burns.
- Wishlist: unlimited slots, pings user when a wishlisted character drops
- Server buff pool: daily communal pot that can unlock server-wide buffs
- Personal milestone: private contribution track with guaranteed personal buffs
- Prestige: repeatable system unlocked after 5 milestones, awards exclusive frames and passive bits bonus
- CSV import: accepts Karuta k!spreadsheet exports to migrate collections

## Tech
- Discord.js v14, TypeScript, Node.js ESM
- SQLite via Prisma ORM
- Hosted on Raspberry Pi 5 via Docker
- WebUI: React + Express (also available as a Discord Activity)
- Docs: Astro static site
- Card assets: pre-generated APNG animations served as static files
